response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:01: Intro/Greeting. 2. 00:01-02:38: Identified 'Baka Mitai' (ばかみたい) performed by Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin. Original composer associated with Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio/Takaya Kuroda. Search queries performed. 3. 02:38-02:44: Network logo. 4. 02:44-03:32: Conversation segment. 5. 03:32-04:06: Merch promo part 1. 6. 04:06-04:30: Merch promo part 2. 7. 04:30-04:39: Outro slide. 8. 04:39-04:46: Network logo. 9. 04:46-05:00: Closing comments. All timestamps finalized.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two VTubers, Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin, who perform a cover of the song 'Baka Mitai', followed by a conversational segment and a promotional segment for their merchandise.

scenes.description: The performers begin with a short greeting.
Cecilia and Gigi perform a cover of 'Baka Mitai'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
馬鹿みたい 子供なのね
夢を追って傷ついて
嘘が下手なくせに 笑えない笑顔みせた
I love youも ろくに言わない
口下手でほんまに不器用
なのになのにどうして
サヨナラは言えたの
だめだね だめよ だめなのよ
あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
どれだけ 強いお酒でも
歪まない思い出が 馬鹿みたい

馬鹿みたい 本当バカね
あんた信じるばかりで
強い女のふり 切なさの夜風浴びる

一人になって 三年が過ぎ
街並みさえも 変わりました
なのになのにどうして
未練だけ置き去り
ほんまに ロクな男やない
揃いの指輪 はずします
ざまあみろ せいせいするわ
いい加減 待ってても 馬鹿みたい
だめだね だめよ だめなのよ
あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
どれだけ 強いお酒でも

ざまあみろ せいせいするわ
なんなのよ この涙 馬鹿みたい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You're such a fool, just a kid
Chasing dreams and getting hurt
You showed a smile that can't hide your bad lies
I love you, you barely even say it
You're so awkward with your words, truly clumsy
Yet, yet why could you say goodbye?

It's no good, it's no good, it's just not right
I love you so damn much
No matter how strong the drink is
These memories that won't fade are just foolish

Foolish, really foolish
I just keep believing in you
Pretending to be a strong woman, feeling the bittersweet night breeze

It's been three years since I was alone
Even the streets have changed
Yet, yet why is only my longing left behind?
You're really no good, not a decent guy
I'm taking off that matching ring
Screw you, I feel so free now
It's just foolish to keep waiting like this
It's no good, it's no good, it's just not right
I love you so damn much
No matter how strong the drink is
These memories that won't fade are just foolish

You're really no good, not a decent guy
I'm taking off that matching ring
Screw you, I feel so free now
What the hell are these tears? It's just foolish

scenes.description: Cecilia and Gigi talk about the 'Autofister' concept.
Merchandise promotion in a saloon setting.
